'''Coorimbus IV''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Coorimbus system/Legends|Coorimbus system]] in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] where [[House Calipsa]] secretly acquired [[Corusca gem/Legends|corusca gems]].

[[Losk Tenchi]] located the secret [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation and was arrested by [[House Calipsa]] to keep their secret safe. He was set free only shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
